SOURCE: 49937469.pdf
IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (49937469.pdf)
SUMMARY: Experienced HR professional with a background in staffing, recruiting, and employee relations. Skilled in policy management, training, and handbook development.
SKILLS: academic, AI, attention to detail, back-up, benefits administration, budget, cash receipts, coaching, contracts, critical thinking, customer satisfaction, customer services, excellent customer service, employee relations, event management, hiring, HR, inventory, layout, leadership, meetings, Excel, organizational skills, payroll, personnel, policies, problem-solving, reconciling, recruiting, research, retail, sales, staffing, store manager, employee handbooks

SOURCE: 49937469.pdf
JOB TITLE: HR Assistant
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: September 2015 - Current
DESCRIPTION: ['Advised managers on organizational policy matters and recommended changes.', 'Conducted new employee orientation to foster positive attitudes.', 'Identified staff vacancies, recruited, interviewed, and selected applicants.', 'Served as a link between management and employees by handling questions, interpreting contracts, and resolving work-related problems.', 'Created and implemented the exit interview program process.', 'Advised top management on appropriate employee corrective actions.', 'Created and modified job descriptions within all departments.', 'Worked with senior-level management to create fair and consistent HR policies and procedures.', 'Supported 77 employees at all levels, including executive leadership.']

SOURCE: 49937469.pdf
JOB TITLE: Experience Specialist
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: November 2011 - September 2015
DESCRIPTION: ['Prevented store losses using awareness and attention to detail.', 'Cross-trained and provided backup for other customer service representatives.', 'Generated sales inventory reports with 100% accuracy.', 'Resolved product issues and shared benefits of new technology.', 'Interacted with customers and retail buyers to expedite orders.', 'Compiled weekly monetary reports and records for store managers.', 'Managed cash stock and inventory balances accurately.']

SOURCE: 49937469.pdf
JOB TITLE: Clerk/Store Manager
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: June 2002 - January 2012
DESCRIPTION: ['Managed a team of 7 professionals.', 'Reduced and controlled expenses by developing an inventory control process.', 'Delivered excellent customer service by greeting and assisting customers.', 'Addressed customer inquiries and resolved complaints.', 'Designed and implemented customer satisfaction metrics.', 'Stocked and restocked inventory when shipments were received.', 'Directed and supervised employees engaged in sales, inventory-taking, and reconciling cash receipts.', 'Determined staff promotions and demotions, and terminated employees as necessary.']

SOURCE: 49937469.pdf
JOB TITLE: Student worker/Multiple departments
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: May 2004 - May 2011
DESCRIPTION: ['Inspired students to translate academic interests into the real world.', 'Initiated thought-provoking classroom discussions.', 'Emphasized academic honesty and instructed on proper citation of research sources.', 'Maintained athletics yearly budget with 100% accuracy.', 'Counseled undergraduates in educational and professional goals.', 'Proctored final exams at the end of each semester.']

SOURCE: 49937469.pdf
JOB TITLE: HR Generalist
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: January 2004 - May 2007
DESCRIPTION: ['Conducted benefits administration for 30 benefit-eligible employees.', 'Designed employee performance evaluation process and merit program.', 'Created and implemented the exit interview program process.', 'Advised top management on appropriate employee corrective actions.', 'Created and modified job descriptions within all departments.', 'Worked with senior-level management to create fair and consistent HR policies and procedures.', 'Developed 2 employee handbooks, including design and layout.']

SOURCE: 49937469.pdf
DEGREE: Bachelor of Arts in Organizational Leadership Management and Human Resource Management
INSTITUTION: Lourdes College
DATES: 2011

DEGREE: Associate of Arts
